TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit HumanInTheLoopExtentions extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Provides helper methods for Human-In-The-Loop (HITL) processing.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string,Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent> GetPendingUserInputRequestContents (Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent agent, Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession? session);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2<string, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent> GetPendingUserInputRequestContents(class Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent agent, class Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession session) cil managed

static member GetPendingUserInputRequestContents : Microsoft.Agents.AI.AIAgent * Microsoft.Agents.AI.AgentSession -> System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent>

Docs.summary: Filter FunctionApprovalRequestContents from an agent's session messages.
Docs.returns: A dictionary with function call_id and FunctionApprovalRequests that are pending for approval.

Docs.param: Optional information about the creator of the item.
Docs.summary: Convert a HITL request to an ItemResource
Docs.returns: An ItemResource representing the HITL request.

Docs.param: Optional information about the creator of the item.
Docs.summary: Convert a MCP HITL request to an ItemResource
Docs.returns: An ItemResource representing the HITL request.

MemberSignature.Value: public static bool TryParseApprovalResponse (string? input, out bool isApproved);
.method public static hidebysig bool TryParseApprovalResponse(string input, [out] bool& isApproved) cil managed
Public Function TryParseApprovalResponse (input As String, ByRef isApproved As Boolean) As Boolean
static member TryParseApprovalResponse : string * bool -> bool

Docs.param: True if the input represents approval; false if it represents denial.
Docs.summary: Tries to parse an input string to determine if it represents an approval or denial.
Docs.returns: True if parsing was successful; false otherwise.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Collections.Generic.List<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage>? ValidateAndConvertResponse (this Azure.AI.AgentServer.Contracts.Generated.Responses.CreateResponseRequest request, System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string,Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent>? pendingRequests);

.method public static hidebysig class System.Collections.Generic.List`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage> ValidateAndConvertResponse(class Azure.AI.AgentServer.Contracts.Generated.Responses.CreateResponseRequest request, class System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary`2<string, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent> pendingRequests) cil managed

static member ValidateAndConvertResponse : Azure.AI.AgentServer.Contracts.Generated.Responses.CreateResponseRequest * System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.UserInputRequestContent> -> System.Collections.Generic.List<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ChatMessage>

Docs.param: Dictionary of pending function approval requests
Docs.summary: Validate a HITL response and convert it to a ChatMessage
Docs.returns: A ChatMessage representing the validated HITL response.
